steps.title: Read the shown line
steps.content:
The graph of $y=f(x)+13$ passes through $(-5,8)$ and $(0,3)$. Its slope is
$$\frac{3-8}{0-(-5)}=-1$$
So the shown line is $y=-x+3$.

steps.title: Match the signs
steps.content: Because $c$ and $d$ are positive, $-x-10$ has the form $-d-cx$. The answer is A.
